title: Reuben Cups
ingredients: ½lb thinly sliced deli corned beef, chopped
instructions:
Spray a mini muffin pan with cooking spray and gently press wontons into each cup.
In a small bowl, combine the corned beef, sauerkraut and dressing.
Spoon the corned beef mixture into each wonton cup and top with the shredded cheese.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until heated through and cheese is melted.
